instructions: Write your email using all the notes.

task.subject: The town festival
task.initialEmail: Hi,||I’m planning the town festival soon. [1]Do you think we should choose Saturday instead of Friday?[/1]||[2]Can you help me this weekend?[/2] I need to organise everything before next week.||[3]Where should we meet to discuss the plans?[/3]||[4]Do you think we should invite more people to help us?[/4]||Write soon||Lucas

sampleAnswer.text: Hi Lucas,||Thanks for your email. [1]I think we should choose Saturday because it sounds more exciting and I believe more students will be interested in it.[/1]||[2]Yes, I can help you this weekend because I don’t have many plans and I’d like to help organise everything properly.[/2]||[3]We should meet in the school library because it is quiet and there are tables where we can work comfortably together.[/3]||[4]In my opinion, we should invite a few more people because it will make the work easier and everyone can share ideas.[/4]||See you soon,||Chris
